description: Create a multi-modal Talon Voice module for a court reporter in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\transcription_assistant. The module, named 'transcription_assistant', must include transcription.py and transcription.talon. Implement actions in transcription.py to insert an uppercased speaker label wrapped in brackets with a trailing colon (e.g., [NAME]: ), insert the current timecode formatted as [HH:MM:SS] , toggle media playback and insert a timecode, and rewind audio by skipping back five times. Map these actions in transcription.talon to the voice commands "speaker <user.text>$", "mark time", "halt and mark", and "audio rewind".
